dialogos.texto_en: Hello!\nWelcome, everyone!
Wow...!\nThey greet us properly.
Yeah, they are so polite.
They even bow.\nHow cute!
From here on, we will show you various stunts we will be performing!
Wow!\nCan dolphins really jump that high?!
It looks like they push the water with their tails.\nHow skillful.
They swim fast too!\nThey move so quickly through the water!
Their form is beautiful!\nI want to swim like that too!
Next, the dolphin will attempt to move the ball to the other side!\nWill the dolphin manage to swim without dropping it?
Woah, they're so good!
Futaro!\nThose dolphins over there\nare doing the backstroke!
Yeah! Their bodies are mostly out of the water!\nHow are they doing that?
Ah! Those ones are doing a handstand in the water!
They're saying something to us!\nI wonder what they're saying?
(Miku is really into this.\n As expected, she was looking forward to this,\n so it's only natural.)
Futaro! Futaro!\nDid you see that? Three of them jumped!
Wow! They did it again!\nAmazing, their movements are perfectly synchronized!
Huhhh?!\nThey're flying and spinning now!
Miku, calm down a bit, huh?
B-but!\nI've never seen anything like this!
I didn't know dolphins could move like this.\nDid you know that, Futaro?
No, it's my first time learning about it too.
(...Good.\n The gap between me and Miku that was there\n until now doesn't feel like it exists anymore.)
(If things keep going like this,\n I might be able to find out\n what Miku was worried about.)
(And then, I might even be able to kiss her...)
(I feel like it's possible!\n No, I should definitely go for it!\n After all, it's the goal of this trip!)
Finally, we'd like to say farewell to everyone!
Futaro!\nThey're waving their tails at us!\nI-it's so cute!
Okay, then let's wave back, eh?
Oh, you're right.\nUm... Thank you, dolphins!
